description_long: This is an ornate handheld mirror with a dark, metallic finish and intricate decorative detailing along the frame and handle. The front features a smooth, reflective surface surrounded by a raised, sculpted border with floral and vine motifs. The back of the mirror is adorned with a prominent, sculpted rose design, adding a touch of elegance and vintage charm. The handle is elaborately shaped, with carved embellishments that provide both grip and aesthetic appeal. The mirror appears to be crafted from metal, possibly cast iron or bronze, giving it a substantial and durable feel. Its overall appearance suggests a Victorian or Gothic-inspired style, suitable for decorative or personal grooming use.
description: An ornate, dark metallic handheld mirror with intricate floral and vine designs, featuring a sculpted rose on the back and a decorative handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reflective mirror surface framed by detailed floral and vine patterns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the mirror's thin profile and the depth of the decorative frame and handle.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a prominent sculpted rose and elaborate ornamental designs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thickness and relief of the frame and handle.
attribute_frame_design: Ornate, oval-shaped frame with raised floral and vine motifs, dark metallic color, and a sculpted rose on the back.
